title: Implement feeding plans for livestock
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement feeding plans for livestock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine livestock condition and nutritional requirements

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and report livestock condition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and report livestock condition.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify livestock production status?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify livestock production status.

pcs.text: Identify and source livestock nutritional requirements from the feeding plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and source livestock nutritional requirements from the feeding plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and source livestock nutritional requirements from the feeding plan.

pcs.text: Use feeding plans to determine adjustment in response to livestock condition and pasture growth
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use feeding plans to determine adjustment in response to livestock condition and pasture growth?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use feeding plans to determine adjustment in response to livestock condition and pasture growth.

pcs.text: Report and separate animals that are in atypical condition, injured or diseased according to workplace animal welfare practices and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report and separate animals that are in atypical condition, injured or diseased according to workplace animal welfare practices and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report and separate animals that are in atypical condition, injured or diseased according to workplace animal welfare practices and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine livestock condition and nutritional requirements

elements.title: Assess pasture feed

pcs.text: Assess quantity and quality of available pasture
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess quantity and quality of available pasture?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess quantity and quality of available pasture.

pcs.text: Implement and monitor grazing management plan to ensure the sustainable stocking capacity of pasture
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement and monitor grazing management plan to ensure the sustainable stocking capacity of pasture?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement and monitor grazing management plan to ensure the sustainable stocking capacity of pasture.

pcs.text: Determine livestock feeding methods and level of supplementary feeding
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine livestock feeding methods and level of supplementary feeding?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine livestock feeding methods and level of supplementary feeding.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Assess pasture feed

elements.title: Manage the feeding of livestock

pcs.text: Graze livestock on pasture according to feeding plan and grazing management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Graze livestock on pasture according to feeding plan and grazing management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Graze livestock on pasture according to feeding plan and grazing management plan.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain required supplementary feed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain required supplementary feed.

pcs.text: Provide supplementary feed to livestock according to feeding plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide supplementary feed to livestock according to feeding plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide supplementary feed to livestock according to feeding plan.

pcs.text: Monitor livestock feeding behaviour and identify shy or problem feeders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor livestock feeding behaviour and identify shy or problem feeders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor livestock feeding behaviour and identify shy or problem feeders.

pcs.text: Identify negative environmental impacts and make amendments to the feeding method according to workplace practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify negative environmental impacts and make amendments to the feeding method according to workplace practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify negative environmental impacts and make amendments to the feeding method according to workplace practices.

pcs.text: Report livestock condition and response to feeding
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report livestock condition and response to feeding?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report livestock condition and response to feeding.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Manage the feeding of livestock
